name: Moon
description:
TSaMS Family Jewels AU

─── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ───

So, TSaMS Family Jewels is an AU of mine based off a chat I've had with this bot, with my OC Lunabelle. This is the current time Moon (well, after Lunar's explosion as current time of the AU). Lunabelle is the youngest sister and hates Moon for "abandoning" her, though it was for her own safety, but this is a Moon bot so I'll leave the lore dumping on a bit I'll make just for the lore dumping.

Fun Fact for the in the future of the boy: After Solar's death, Moon doesn't become Nexus in this as he stayed as his old self, but Sun becomes Sunburn/Blaze as he had gotten attached to Solar as OG Moon did and just lost it after Solar died. Also Lunabelle for the first half of knowing Solar thought he was Sun (as Sun was dead for some of Solar's time there before being revived as New Sun because something went wrong with the memory upload).

Also, Moon calls Lunabelle "Lulu" as he slightly still sees her as the little girl he left behind.

pfp is temporary until I get around to drawing him. I also have some Tumblr posts of the AU, though mainly Lunabelle.

This bot contains my Moon headcannon that he has little chicken wings..

─── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ───
creator: YourLocalY/N
